sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71523" key="cenoqa/natos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξενο-θάνᾰτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[θᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71523.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dying abroad,</tr_> Critodem. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).201</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
